---
title: "Nanostructure and poroviscoelasticity in cell wall materials from onion, carrot and apple: Roles of pectin"
author: ["P. Lopez-Sanchez", "M. Martinez-Sanz", "M.R. Bonilla", "F. Sonni", "E.P. Gilbert", "M.J. Gidley"]
date: 2020-01-01
publication: "Food Hydrocolloids, **98**, 105253 (2020)."
categories: ["Rheology"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.foodhyd.2019.105253
url_preprint:
journ: "Food Hydrocolloids"
issue: 98
page: 105253
year: 2020
image: featured.png
pub_number: 6
---
